AI notes: ### Action Items ### Meeting Overview ### Pixie Product Overview - **Custom Story Creation**: Parents input 5-6 parameters (child's age, name, loved ones, educational lesson, story type, character preferences) and generate personalized 4-5 minute audio stories - **One-Tap Pre-Generated Content**: Repository of stories across themes that instantly personalize with child's name - **Screen Lock Mode**: Stories continue playing with screen locked, similar to Spotify, dramatically increasing listening time - **Sleep Timer**: Automatically stops playback after set duration, addressing parent feedback - **Personal Library**: Dedicated space for children to re-listen to favorite stories independently - **Voice Cloning**: Parents can record their own voice or choose from narrator voices - **Alexa Integration**: Available as Alexa skill for hands-free access ### Technical Architecture ### Traction & User Behavior ### Business Model & Monetization ### Go-to-Market Strategy ### Key Challenges - **Children** want unrestricted entertainment, relatable stories where they're the hero, fun with friends - **Parents** want screen-free, educational content that teaches vocabulary, concepts, and values (like using Hindi to teach Gujarati kids) ### Fundraising Details ### Next Steps

Pokus AI — Investor deck summary: - Problem - Urban consumers spend significant time on operational chores and recurring tasks. These involve research, coordination, booking, negotiation, and follow‑ups. - Solution - A WhatsApp-first “personal assistant in your pocket” that combines AI automation with human ops for edge cases and physical execution. - Aim: move from reactive task handling to proactive, workflow-led assistance via a memory layer and recommendations - Product and workflows - Handles ad‑hoc and recurring tasks: home repairs, vendor coordination, cab bookings, refunds, gifting, licenses, etc. - Examples of automated or semi‑automated workflows: weekly groceries, daily porter, routine cab bookings, medicine reminders/refills, restaurant reservations, gifting cadences. - Approach and tech - Hybrid Human + AI architecture. - Modular stack: AI Relationship Manager for memory and recommendations, Executor OS for task capture, grading, SOP generation, and a copilot for human operators. - Progressive automation roadmap across planning, search, subjective research, booking, calling, form filling, coordination, summarization. - ICP and use cases - 25–28: lifestyle and exploratory tasks. - 28–35: self and parents use cases, home management becomes sticky. - 35+: higher value “function outsourcing” such as home manager, recurring logistics, and family routines. - Positioning gravitates toward a “household COO” for families and busy professionals.[ - Traction - ~60 paying su...

Company Overview & Founder Profile (Feb 2026) - 2026-02-27: AI-powered fashion discovery platform — personalized outfit recommendations, virtual try-ons, and style inspiration. Swipe-based UI for outfit curation, brand filtering, budget-aware suggestions. Founded Jun 2024, bootstrapped. FOUNDER: • Shekhar Chatterjee — Co-founder/CEO. Ashoka University (CS + Entrepreneurship, PG Diploma). Serial founder: SmartCitizen Labs (emergency response app, won UN Karmaveer Chakra), NoCap Meta (VR solution, raised ₹2cr per The Hindu), NoCap Research (managed ₹1.2cr AUM, 45% returns over 28mo). Also: Head of Engineering at Neuroute (clinical dev platform, London), Consultant at EXL, NVIDIA intern, Director of Technology at Harvard US-India Initiative. Based in Vadodara. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shekharchatterjee/ ATTIO CRM: • Email activity: Feb 26, 2026 • Meeting: Feb 27, 2026 • Domain: polopan.com Link to the MIS - [https://polopan.com/analytics.html](https://polopan.com/analytics.html) SOURCE: Trinika flagged in Consumer + DeVC group (Feb 27, 2026) --- **TK Views ** - **TK View: WM ** - Spikey: 0 - Spikey Needed: Consumer, and product - ++ High IQ and first principled - ++ Understand P&L – comes from exporter family in Gujrat - ++ Numerate and analytical ++ Outside in – aware of shoppin failure points and in touch with shlok - ++ customer backward thinking - ++ Great techie - ?? difficult market to win – thin stack + low AOV because T2/3 - ?? Have been dabbling around with...

Note from @Anonymous 2025-10-14: Sharing the note for our $50K investment in Potpie as part of their seed round of $2M a $12.5M valuation cap, led by Emergent VC - $1.5M. About the Company Potpie is building an AI-driven behavioural code auditor that enables developers to ship bug-free code to production confidently by automatically validating the intended code behaviour at every git push. Problem Statement: engineers today spend nearly 5x the time testing vs writing code, with ~40% of total developer bandwidth going into writing and maintaining test cases. Despite this, $2.4T in losses were attributed to poor-quality software shipped in the US in 2022. Momentum’s product uses code behaviour analysis, test generation, and automated validation to ensure code correctness in real-time. Core Product Features: - Behavioural code auditor that analyzes code functionality, efficacy, and inter-compatibility. - Automatically generates end-to-end tests and integrates them into the repo. - Visualizes codebase architecture to catch dependency issues. - Ensures every commit meets defined behavioural criteria before production deployment. Traction & Progress - Open-source v1 launched (FY25 Q1). - 15+ pilots landed in the past 8 weeks with companies like Tata 1mg and Bain & Co. - 2 pilots completed, 2 ongoing, and 15 in pipeline. - Product roadmap includes enterprise rollout with self-healing tests, debugging in natural language, SOC2/GDPR compliance, and CI/CD integrations. Founders [Aditi ...

About the Company: PowerEdge provides a suite of bank-tech solutions focused on: 1. **Collections Management**: - Currently managing ~40,000 customers with 90-93% recovery rates in early buckets. - Their collections stack combines digital, telephony, and field channels and has 30% lower losses than industry average. - Collection revenue is projected to contribute ~$21M by FY27. 1. **CCMS Middleware**: - Building modular tools over legacy CCMS platforms (VisionPlus, TSYS) to enable better reward programs and customer experience without banks having to switch cores. - Revenue model: ₹5/card/month; already integrated with Yes Bank, BoB Cards. 1. **Fraud Ring Detection**: - Uses graph algorithms and ML on application data to detect fraud. - 60% precision with 1–2% match rate vs Hunter’s 3% precision on 10% match rate. - Live with Uni, in PoC with Navi, Jupiter. Current Revenue**:** - $1.1M booked, projected to hit $4.5M ARR by March 2025 ~85% of current revenue from Uni - Clients: Uni, Fibe, OneCard, MoneyView - PoCs in progress with Navi, Jupiter - Banks live: BoB, Yes Bank (through Uni relationships) Founders **Abhishek Gupta (CEO)** - Ex-CTO @ Uni, LazyPay/PayU - Deep tech experience in credit infra, strong founder-market fit for bank-tech infra. - IIT Kanpur, M.Tech CS **Ajay Jadaun (COO)** - Ex-Sr. Director of Risk @ Uni, Head of Cards Risk @ Bajaj - Equifax, StanC alumni - IIT Madras Chem Eng ’10 - Strong risk ops mind with understanding of cards and collections **Apoorv Ag...

Deck 2025-02-11T20:15:00.000+05:30: Based on the PowerUp Money pitch deck, here are the key points: **Company Overview:** - Building a DIY mutual fund advisory platform targeting the mass affluent segment with portfolios between 5L-1Cr - Offers fund selection, portfolio review, and rebalancing through an app-based product - Currently has 155,619 users acquired at <$1 CAC **Business Model:** - Freemium model with Elite subscription at ₹999/year - 53% of surveyed users willing to pay for subscription - Claims to deliver similar alpha as traditional advisors at 1/300th the cost **Traction & Growth:** - YouTube channel with 67K subscribers and 10M+ views in 6 months - Planning to expand into FDs and other wealth products - Raising $5M to reach $14M ARR by April 2027 **Team:** - Led by Prateek Jindal (ex-Uni Cards CPO, ex-Ola Financial Services) - Key hires from Uni, Groww, UpGrad with experience in design, engineering, and marketing **Market Opportunity:** - Targeting growing mutual fund market (52M investors in 2024 → projected 116M by 2029) - 83-88% of users face challenges in fund selection, review, and rebalancing
